about.title: hione
about.subtitle: all in one ai tools
about.description: The next-generation AI collaboration platform designed for developers. With a localized session engine, integrate multiple top-tier models into an ultra-smooth terminal experience.
about.starMe: If you like this project, please give us a star on GitHub ⭐️

privacy.title: Privacy-First
privacy.desc: Data stored locally, sessions without intermediaries. Security is our foundation.

speed.title: Millisecond Response
speed.desc: Rust-powered core engine delivers blazing-fast command response.

multimodal.title: Multi-Model Collaboration
multimodal.desc: Seamlessly switch between Claude, Codex, Gemini, Opencode, Qwen in one interface.

opensource.title: Open Source Spirit
opensource.desc: Transparent codebase, community-driven, continuously powering productivity tools.
